title: Nike Air Max 90
description: Classic running and lifestyle shoe with visible Air cushioning. Lightweight mesh upper with leather overlays.

title: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: High-performance running shoe with Boost midsole for energy return. Primeknit+ upper for adaptive fit.

title: New Balance 990v6
description: Premium everyday trainer made in USA. ENCAP midsole for superior cushioning and durability.

title: Brooks Ghost 15
description: Soft-cushioned road running shoe. DNA LOFT v2 foam for smooth transitions, Balanced Cushion.

title: ASICS Gel-Nimbus 25
description: Max cushion long-distance running shoe with GEL technology. FF BLAST PLUS ECO foam.

title: Hoka Clifton 9
description: Versatile high-mileage trainer with plush EVA foam stack. Lightweight and ultra-cushioned.

title: Salomon Speedcross 6
description: Aggressive trail running shoe with deep lug outsole for muddy and technical terrain.

title: On Cloudrunner 2
description: Road running shoe with CloudTec cushioning technology. Soft landings and powerful push-offs.

title: Merrell Moab 3 Hiking Boot
description: Waterproof hiking boot with Vibram outsole. Bellows tongue keeps out debris on trail.

title: Saucony Endorphin Speed 3
description: Carbon fiber-plated speed trainer. SPEEDROLL technology and PWRRUN PB foam.

title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling with Auto NC Optimizer. Up to 30-hour battery life, crystal clear hands-free calling.

title: Apple AirPods Pro 2nd Gen
description: Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Transparency, Spatial Audio. H2 chip for intelligent sound.

title: Bose QuietComfort 45 Headphones
description: Wireless headphones with high-fidelity audio. TriPort acoustic architecture, proprietary active EQ.

title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: 200MP camera, S Pen included. Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, titanium frame, AI-powered features.

title: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
description: Titanium design with A17 Pro chip. 48MP main camera, USB 3 for faster transfers, ProMotion display.

title: Dell XPS 15 Laptop
description: InfinityEdge OLED display, Intel Core i9, 32GB RAM, NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4060. Premium aluminum build.

title: Apple MacBook Air M3
description: M3 chip with 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU. 18-hour battery life, fanless design, Liquid Retina display.

title: JBL Flip 6 Portable Speaker
description: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 12 hours of playtime. PartyBoost to link multiple JBL speakers.

title: Kindle Paperwhite 11th Gen
description: 300 ppi glare-free display, adjustable warm light, up to 10 weeks on single charge. Waterproof.

title: iPad Air 5th Gen
description: M1 chip, 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display, USB-C, compatible with Apple Pencil and Magic Keyboard.

title: Lululemon The Mat 5mm Yoga Mat
description: Natural rubber base with polyurethane top layer. Non-slip, sweat-absorbing, and odor-resistant.

title: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Lifetime guarantee. Closed-cell surface prevents bacteria and mold. Dense cushioning for joint support.

title: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells
description: Adjusts from 5-52.5 lbs in 2.5 lb increments. Replaces 15 sets of weights. Easy dial selector.

title: TRX All-in-One Suspension Trainer
description: Enables over 300 exercises. Adjustable foot cradles, handles, and door/ceiling anchors included.

title: Theragun Prime Massage Gun
description: Deep muscle treatment with QuietForce Technology. 4 attachments, 5 built-in speeds, Bluetooth.

title: Garmin Forerunner 265 GPS Watch
description: AMOLED display, Training Readiness score, Race Widget predictor, HRV Status, 13-day battery.

title: Fitbit Charge 6 Fitness Tracker
description: Built-in GPS, heart rate tracking, ECG app, sleep tracking. Works with Google Maps and Wallet.

title: Hydro Flask 32 oz Water Bottle
description: TempShield double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. BPA-free.

title: Peloton Bike+ Exercise Bike
description: Auto-Follow resistance, rotating 23.8 touchscreen, real-time metrics, Apple GymKit integration.

title: NordicTrack T 6.5 Si Treadmill
description: 10% incline, 10 MPH max speed, iFIT-enabled 10 touchscreen, SpaceSaver design with EasyLift Assist.

title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
description: Pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté, yogurt maker, and warmer. 6-quart.

title: KitchenAid Artisan 5qt Stand Mixer
description: Tilt-head stand mixer with 10 speeds. Includes flat beater, dough hook, wire whip. 59 attachments available.

title: Ninja Foodi 6qt Air Fryer
description: Crisps, roasts, reheats, dehydrates. 4-quart ceramic-coated basket, nonstick. DualZone technology.

title: Vitamix 5200 Professional Blender
description: Variable speed control, aircraft-grade stainless steel blades. Self-cleaning in 30 to 60 seconds.

title: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
description: Laser Slim Fluffy head reveals hidden dust. Particle count display, HEPA filtration, 60 min runtime.

title: iRobot Roomba j7+ Robot Vacuum
description: iRobot OS anticipates and adapts. PrecisionVision Navigation avoids objects. Auto-empty base included.

title: Nespresso Vertuo Next Coffee Machine
description: Centrifusion extraction for single-serve coffee. Wi-Fi connected for new blend updates. 5 cup sizes.

title: Lodge 12 Inch Cast Iron Skillet
description: Pre-seasoned with 100% natural vegetable oil. Works on all cooking surfaces including induction.

title: Dyson Purifier Hot+Cool Fan
description: Air purifier, heater, and fan. HEPA + activated carbon filters, 360 degree purification, voice control.

title: Breville Precision Brewer Drip Coffee Maker
description: SCAA-certified gold cup standard. Thermal carafe, bloom function, adjustable brew temperature.

title: Patagonia Nano Puff Jacket
description: Lightweight insulation with PrimaLoft Gold Eco 60g synthetic fill. Windproof, water-resistant. Fair Trade.

title: The North Face ThermoBall Eco Jacket
description: Packable synthetic insulation jacket. Halo technology with 100% recycled PrimaLoft fill. Packs into pocket.

title: Levi's 501 Original Fit Jeans
description: Straight leg, button fly. Made with Levi's signature denim. Classic style since 1873. Shrink-to-fit.

title: Arc'teryx Atom Hoody
description: Coreloft Compact 60 insulation. Trim fit for layering, stretch fleece side panels for mobility.

title: Under Armour HeatGear Compression Shirt
description: Ultra-tight compression fit. HeatGear fabric wicks sweat, dries fast. Anti-odor technology.

description: Sweat-wicking Dri-FIT fabric. Split hem for mobility, internal brief, reflective elements.

title: Patagonia Baggies 5 Shorts
description: Quick-dry ripstop nylon. Internal brief, secure-zip pocket, ultralight. Swim, hike, hang around.

title: Columbia PFG Tamiami II Fishing Shirt
description: Omni-Shade UPF 40 sun protection, Omni-Wick moisture management. Vented back. Lightweight mesh.

title: Darn Tough Hiker Boot Full Cushion Sock

title: Smartwool Classic Mountaineer Socks
description: Full cushion 250-weight Merino wool. OTC height for boot coverage, reinforced heel and toe.
